description: MCP server for OpenEMIS v5 — read + write tools and ChatGPT OpenAPI adapter
name: io.github.tixuz/openemis-pro

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your OpenEMIS instance (e.g., https://demo.openemis.org/core)
environmentVariables.name: OPENEMIS_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: OpenEMIS API key (issued by the OpenEMIS admin). Required for every upstream login.
environmentVariables.name: OPENEMIS_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: OpenEMIS login username. Optional — if unset, server fails closed and requires openemis_login at runtime.
environmentVariables.name: OPENEMIS_USERNAME

environmentVariables.description: OpenEMIS login password. Pairs with OPENEMIS_USERNAME for env-default auth.
environmentVariables.name: OPENEMIS_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to enable native IN-operator batch GETs once your OpenEMIS Core has POCOR-9660 deployed.
environmentVariables.name: OPENEMIS_CORE_IN_OPERATOR
